gates.title: Real observation ingestion and mapping audit
Defensible direct-temporal drizzle-onset validation
gates.blocker: No observation dataset has yet demonstrated a defensible parcel-time mapping. BASTALIAS is a spatiotemporal proxy.
completion_evidence: A source dataset with immutable provenance
A reviewed sampled-volume and time-origin mapping

gates.title: Final scientific claims and limitations review
completion_evidence: The operational 1% floor is retained, revised, or rejected with evidence
Supported and unsupported claims are stated consistently across release documentation

gates.title: Release candidate verification and documentation freeze
completion_evidence: Cross-platform CI and real PySDM integration pass on the release candidate
CHANGELOG and user workflow are verified
No unresolved required release gate remains

deferred.reason: Serial versus 4/8-worker server benchmarking is operational optimization, not a v1.0 scientific validity requirement.
